skater_rank_basis: Default rank is reliability- and uncertainty-shrunk Total. Finishing is a 5v5 HLD shooter-talent rate over EV TOI, Playmaking is a strongly certainty-shrunk standardized 5v5 HLD on-ice rush-for score with a minimum sample gate, Rush Def is a strongly certainty-shrunk 5v5 defensive rush proxy with a minimum sample gate, Chance Gen and Chance Supp are volume-based 5v5 components, and QoC/QoT are standardized into context components instead of using raw tiny values. 5v5, PP, and PK xGAR/60 are shown separately and ranked with state-specific sample shrinkage.
goalie_rank_basis: Ranked by Shot Danger Adjusted GSAx 5v5/60, then GSAX/60, then SVAAE. Includes goalies with starts >= min(10, ceil(10% of an 82-game season)).
team_rank_basis: Total Team Score blends z-scored shooting talent, playmaking talent, goaltending talent, chance generation, chance suppression, high-danger for, high-danger against, and special teams. Shooting talent is shot-weighted HLD shooter talent, playmaking talent is shot-weighted HLD rush/context talent, goaltending talent is TOI-weighted HLD 5v5 GSAx/60, chance generation is non-empty-net xGF/game relative to league average, chance suppression is league-average xGA/game minus team xGA/game, high-danger for counts non-empty-net shots with xG >= 0.20 per game, and high-danger against is the per-game rate of those chances allowed.
underrated_rank_basis: Underplayed score = ((0.75 + 0.25*TalentNorm) * max(0, TalentNorm - TOINorm) * context_factor(QoCNorm-QoTNorm) * reliability), with min-max normalization within position buckets (C/L/R/LD/RD).

scoring_anomalies.basis: Minimum 10 total points for point-profile tables and minimum 8 total goals for 5v5 goal-share. Points are derived from season goal events. 5v5 means exact 5 skaters vs 5 skaters with goalies on ice. Power-play points include all man-advantage goal points with a goalie in net. 5v5 + PP can be less than total because shorthanded, 4v4, 3v3, and extra-attacker situations are separate.
